calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:07am
Judge Pro Tem Sharon L. O'Grady, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. No appearance by respondent Patrick J. Williams; Appellant appears through counsel, Randy A. Moss. Mr. Moss appears to inform the Court he is filing a dismissal on behalf of the Appellant. Mr. Moss also lodges a settlement statement, signed by the parties, with the Court. He submits a dismissal of the entire action, with prejudice, for Small Claims action No. 819736. No new evidence is admitted
